verses.text: Tua ahih manin hong pai leng note' dahna ding hong piangding ahih manin ka hong pailohna dingin ka lungsim ka khensat hi
Kei a hong lungdamsak ding note ke'n hong dahsak leng, kei kua in hong lungdamsak nawn ding ahi hiam

Kei lungdam leng note khempeuh zong a lungdam ding na hihna uh teltakin thei ka hih manin, kei a hong lungdamsak ding note in kei' dahna nong pian'sakkhak lohna ding uh ka deihna tawh kei hong pailoin tua lai a hong gelh ka hi hi
Tua lai ka gelh laitakin, note' dahna ding piangsakkha loin note ka hong it mahmahna na phawkna ding uh ka deihna tawh ka gelh hi a, lungkham sinkhamna leh khitui naptui kai-in a gelh ka hi hi.
Mi khatpeuh in hehna ding a pian'sak ciangin kei bek a hong hehsak hiloin note khempeuh zong a hong hehsak ahi hi. Tua ahih manin tua bang mi tungah khauhtat lua nawn kei un
Note' gimpiaknasa pen kicing khinzo ka sa hi
Tua ahih manin a mawhna maisak ta un la hehnemzaw un. Tua hi kei leh dahlua-in siatlawh khading hi
Amah na itkik ding uh ka hong thumna thu zong amah na theisak un
Note in ze-etna bangzah ciang thuakzo-in, ka thugente na hong mangzo uh hiam cih ka theihna dingin tua lai a hong gelh ka hi hi
Note in mawhna na maisak uh ciangin kei zong a maisak ka hi hi. Mawhna maisak ding om ahih leh zong, mawhna ka maisak ciangin Khrih hang leh note' phattuamna dingin a maisak ka hi hi
Mawhna maisak kei lehang Satan in nuamtaksa-in eite tungah hong gualzo khading ahih manin mawhna a maisak ihi hi. Satan' nasepna zia a theilo ihi kei hi.
Khrih hangin lungdamna thu a hilh dingin Troas khua ka tun' ciangin tua lai-ah nasep theihna dingin Topa in lampi hong hon'sakna thu ka mu hi
Ahi zongin tua lai-ah i sanggampa Titus na omlo ahih manin ka lungsim om thei nawnlo hi. Tua ahih manin tua lai-a om mite nusia-in Masedonia gamah ka paisuak hi.

Ahi zongin Pasian tungah lungdam mahmahna ding thu a om hi. Khrih tawh ka kipawlna hangun gualzawhna tawh Khrih a paina khempeuhah Pasian in kote hong zuisak hi. Mun khempeuhah paknamtui a kizelh bangin Khrih thu theihna a kizelsak dingin Pasian in kote hong zang hi
Hotkhiatna a ngah mite leh a ngahlo mite lakah kote pen Khrih in Pasian tungah a piak paknamtui tawh ka kibang uh hi
Tua a nam pen, thu umlo mite-a' dingin mi a sisakthei a nam khauh mahmah hi a, hotkhiatna a ngah mite-a' dingin mi a hingsakthei a namtui mahmah ahi hi. Hih nasep a sem dingin kua kilawm ahi hiam

Ahi zongin kote pen, van gina tumlo a zuak mite tawh a kibang ahi, Pasian' thu a gen mawkmawk midangte bang ka hi kei uh a, Pasian in a nasem dingin kote hong sawl ahih manin Khrih nasem hihna tawh ama mai-ah lungsim takpi tawh thugente ka hi uh hi.
